request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that countries with strong strategic autonomy actually have better civil liberties records? The data shows that when nations rely less on foreign tech and defense systems, they gain more control over their own security and freedoms. Our neighbors in Europe have proven this model works. Why shouldn't we demand the same for ourselves? #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
